queries.question: What are the IDs of action movies and adventure movies directed by Sofia Martinez?
queries.sql:
SELECT Action_Movie.movieId
FROM Director JOIN Movie ON Director.id = Movie.directorId JOIN Action_Movie ON Movie.id = Action_Movie.movieId
WHERE Director.name = 'Sofia Martinez'
UNION
SELECT Adventure_Movie.movieId
FROM Director JOIN Movie ON Director.id = Movie.directorId JOIN Adventure_Movie ON Movie.id = Adventure_Movie.movieId
WHERE Director.name = 'Sofia Martinez'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?director a :Director .
    ?movie a :Movie .
    ?movie p:hasDirector ?director .
    ?action_movie a :Action_Movie .
    ?action_movie p:hasMovie ?movie .
    ?action_movie p:movieId ?movieid .
    ?director p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Sofia Martinez")
    BIND(?movieid AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?director a :Director .
    ?movie a :Movie .
    ?movie p:hasDirector ?director .
    ?adventure_movie a :Adventure_Movie .
    ?adventure_movie p:hasMovie ?movie .
    ?adventure_movie p:movieId ?movieid .
    ?director p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Sofia Martinez")
    BIND(?movieid AS ?o0)
  }
}
